hero.sub: Suku is your personal AI assistant that manages your tasks, projects, habits, workouts, and calendar, thinking ahead so you don't have to.

bento.title: Manage your life like a CEO.

chat.title: AI Chat
chat.desc: Talk to Suku in plain language. It acts immediately.
chat.msg1user: Remind me to call dentist tomorrow
chat.msg2user: And add it to my calendar
chat.msg2ai: Added to your calendar as well 📅

gym.title: Gym Tracker
gym.desc: Log sets, track PRs, see progress.

notif.title: Proactive Notifications
notif.desc: Suku notifies you before you forget.

taglines.t1: Manage your life like a CEO.
taglines.t3: Everything you are. Everything you do. One place.

how.title: Your AI. Your rules.
how.step1desc: Type or speak anything: set a reminder, log a workout, plan your week. Natural language, always.
how.step2desc: Instantly creates tasks, sets reminders, updates habits, and plans your schedule. No extra steps needed.
how.step3desc: Get smart, proactive alerts at exactly the right moment. Suku thinks ahead so you don't have to.

cta.title: Ready to run your life?
cta.sub: Try the demo. No account needed.

access.successSub: I'll be in touch soon. Suku is built for people who actually want to take control of their life.
access.title: Get full access to Suku.
access.sub: Fill out the form below and I'll reach out to you directly.
access.reasonLabel: What do you want to use Suku for?

access.note: No spam. No newsletters. Just a reply from me.
